reviews.review_title: Update: DLC Broke, can't play Offline
reviews.review_description: Every time I start this game up now, I have to click on a DLC piece, it takes me to the Shop, realizes I already have it, reset my character's looks... I thought it was just me after disconnecting my Facebook account from Meta. Looks like it's quite the common problem though! Please fix this, it used to be my favorite way to work out!

Keeps telling me to purchase the game when I already did and had been playing just fine. All of a sudden now it's telling me I need to purchase the game again. I've tried uninstalling and reinstalling. Nothing. Pls tell me how to fix this. Quest 2 vr
You guys need to polish the hit detection better it's annoying hitting notes and it's not registering as a hit.

reviews.review_title: Ragnarock alone made my Quest 3 worth it
reviews.review_description: I bought the Meta Quest 3 months ago, and honestly, Ragnarock alone justifies the purchase. Every time I tell myself “just 20 minutes” or “a few songs,” I end up playing for nearly an hour. It’s pure fun, great music, and an incredible workout—I’m always drenched in sweat and grinning. The Viking theme, the drumming, the rhythm—it all clicks perfectly. The tracks stick in my head for days. Simply one of the best VR rhythm games out there.

This is one of the most exciting and enjoyable games I've played in 45+ years as a gamer. A simple concept, done to perfection.

The view reset went wrong once, it was facing backwards so I couldn't access the menu from my sofa. Power off didn't help. It was just this game so I'd advise looking into that.

It would be nice to have the side drums a little closer / movable.

I genuinely hate to return to this game now having logged several hours of gameplay.  a game that is unnecessar punishing +unpolished deserves and unforgiving review. 

I just once again watched my hammer just phase through the drums and miss notes botching my combo meter multiple times. One time the combo drum didn't even register, literally ruining my run, and any fun and immersion I had with it. 

original review: 
"Fun but flawed" 3 stars

The fun factor is huge, I hesitantly recommend this though. 

The hit detection is questionable and that is a make or break for a rhythm game. Sometimes I’d see my hammer phase right through a drum, others I just disagreed with the window for error. This is very disheartening, and definitely breaks me from my "flow"

Thing is you have a “boost” that charges up. It would feel more fair if it only docked only a bit. But when you miss it docks the whole charge. This should be a fun little addition, but the amount of times I have it charged up quite a bit and lose it ALL in an instant because you have to hit the drum in a blink of an eye. 

Honestly coupled with the issues of hit registration, and the unforgiving nature of the drum runes- this ruins a great deal of the game for me. It just doesn't feel like a fair balance, sapping the fun of the flow. 

Honestly if they got rid of the boost mechanic it would be an improvement. Though I think they should keep it, and work on hit registration, and add more forgiveness to when the run passes (it feels like you can hit them earlier than you can late, and that throws off my expectations as I see the notes approach.) They SHOULDN'T make it so you lose the charge if you miss a single note. That is WAY too punishing especially with the balance issues mentioned. They should make it so that if you miss three in a row your charge pauses or has a minor dock. This all or nothing is just awful. 


I really hope they make it more forgiving. 


I want to like this game more than I do.

I absolutely adore this game and have enjoyed it for many years now. But recently, I realized that we can no longer play any of our paid dlc when offline.

I would love to give this game 5 stars but it feels like I was just robbed since I can no longer play any of my dlcs.... So I hope the devs fix this but until they do this will have to remain as a 1 star review.
This game constantly doesn't register my left controller and I get missed notes. I do not have this issue on ANY other game. Wish I could get my money back.

reviews.review_title: You downloaded it and you can't play it
reviews.review_description: Because I can't play the DLC without internet access, even though the DLC is downloaded to Oculus.

A great game with some outstanding music that you never see in these kinds of games (theres no ABBA or Rolling Stones here). I like the addition of a bunch of drum modifiers so you can get the timing right for your personal variables.
It  keeps saying I am offline when I am not limiting my playing options.
Multiplayer works

Love this game
play it every morning to wake up
feel like a viking rock star...Skal

reviews.review_title: App stuck facing the wrong direction
reviews.review_description: the game is constantly facing the wrong way. i am disabled and can't turn around so i cannot play the game

Whenever I launch the game it starts from behind the play area. Recentering it doesn't help. I tried uninstalling and reinstalling but nothing has helped yet. The game has become unplayable for me. Other than that it WAS my favorite VR game.

reviews.review_title: Game is no longer playable on v77
reviews.review_description:
Game opens behind a door and behind the song selection screen with a loud shuttering sound on repeat. Pressing the trigger causes a game crash. Uninstalled, reinstalled. Uninstalled, factory reset , and reinstalled, and is still no longer able to be played. Also cleared guardians, set new guardians. Tried to roomscale my way back to the song selection screen and it still crashed when using the trigger. Was my Beat Saber replacement until today 🥺

Update:
I did find a very bizarre way to fix it. I set a roomscale boundary covering the entire main floor of the house. I walked around until I was able to get the pointer facing a song on the song board from a ridiculous distance. I started a song and then re-centered and it moved the drums to where I was standing. I then went to where I wanted to be, and re-centered again. Now it works. Leaving this review for the devs to sort this problem. Another review had this happen 3 months ago. I went through many crashes before this fix worked.

reviews.review_title: Hands down the best VR game I’ve played
reviews.review_description: I keep coming back to this game year after year and have yet to get tired of it. Great songs (especially if you go the custom route) and a great workout.

reviews.review_title: Extra content won't load in game
reviews.review_description: Despite purchasing the extra content, it will not load in the game

Do you like rhythm games but are tired of punching things or slashing blocks? Are you tired of the same lame cookie cutter songs? Do you regret selling that bulky Rock Band drum kit at a yard sale? Have you ever seen an overweight drummer?

Ragnarock might be your bag...narok. Rock music that makes you dance even if you aren't familiar with it, and if you play it like it's meant to be played, i.e. really whaling on those drums, you WILL move and you WILL sweat, even on easier levels (which has always been my complaint about Beat Saber...easy levels boring, harder levels too hard). There's something really satisfying about hitting a streak perfectly, thumping as hard as you can, grinning like a demon, and calling down the lightning like Thor himself! 

I like that the songs are rated by number, not just "easy, normal, hard," because sometimes "normal" is somewhere closer to expert. Comes with custom song and multiplayer capability already. The game already has almost everything I could want. 

Otherwise this game is killer and a keeper!  Y'all might owe me a few commissions, I recommended this in my Facebook group and got lots of interest.  :)

UPDATE:  Have bought both DLC packs, both well worth the price! Love a dev that keeps on giving. Keep up the excellent work!

reviews.review_title: For the glory of the Vikings!
reviews.review_description:
Just buy this, its one of the best music/rytmgame, with awsome music,  if you want it you can use it as a fitnessapp because you are gonna sweat!

The game has custom songs and thats awsome,  however this games deserves support and there is a lot of awsome music to buy. Hands down one of the best vrgames.
This game is so much fun, the multiplayer is great, songs are incredibly upbeat. My arms are incredibly sore but I just can’t stop playing. Just buy this game! You won’t regret it.

I would love to give a 5 star review but I am currently stuck behind the song selection board and am unable to play. I've unistalled, reinstalled, downloaded all updates and factory reset my quest 2. I am still behind the song selection board and all the money I put into this game is wasted since I can't play it.
Superior motivational soundtracks! Once you start play you just can't stop! Calories burns like a fire! Very good fitness game!

I got my vr a few days ago and I was searching up for the legendary game “beat saber” when I came across this game. At first it just looked like a beat saber rip off and I didn’t want to buy it but a couple days later I caved in and bought it cause it was on sale. I wasn’t expecting much but this game is an absolute masterpiece. It has everything beat saber has without feeling like a total copy of the game. I love the music style and I love the feeling when I finally get gold on one of the levels I was struggling on. I usually have a strict schedule on what games to play on vr cause I have so many games to juggle around and I want to play them all equally but I find myself breaking that schedule just so I can play this game. 10/10 for sure.
I love this game and i just love how woth the modifiers i can make it faster and push my self to my limits

reviews.review_title: Brings a smile to my face
reviews.review_description: Simple to play challenging to master. You could just play songs on easy forever and never even try the more difficult songs and this game would still be worth every penny. It gets the Viking blood coursing through my veins.

This game is so much fun(I’m not a bot). It’s a little hard to get the timing right but it’s so rewarding when you get a streak going. Also a lot of rhythm games don’t have songs like this so it stands out.
The best!!!
Awesome. Great as a workout for people trying to lose weight, especially with wrist weights. 100% recommend ;)
I buy the complete collection of this game when I play offline.  Don't let me to play the songs I buy . I try to request refund they don't let me. Even I don't play a hour. Beware don't buy this scam
TOP
The music selection is unmatched! I absolutely love every single song in this game.

reviews.review_title: Buying the game gives a worse experience
reviews.review_description: I bought Ragnarock, but in offline mode, all my purchased songs and unlocked drums are unavailable. This is unacceptable. Paying for the game should not result in a worse experience than sailing the high seas, where all the songs are unlocked. Developers need to fix this immediately so customers can access all their content offline. I would return this game if I could, but I'm out of the return window. I will just continue to use the pirated version, where all the song are unlocked. It was worth locking them in offline mode, really a genius idea...

Graphics are really ugly, the characters look like minecraft. You're supposed to be in a boat being rowed but there is no sense of forward motion. You're basically standing there hitting the drums as the pattern comes at you. I'd prefer they migrated the music over to a better game, such as beat saber. It's all wasted on this one.

developer_response.body:
Hello Jsgcxxx, 

Thanks for your review. 

We are sorry that you did not appreciate the design of the game. It is made of low poly graphics and we are aware that it's a bold choice, but that's okay. We're still super thankful that you played :)

- Tiffany

reviews.review_description: In my opinion, this is without a doubt the best rhythm game on Meta Quest 2. Nice graphics, a great set of songs, extremely addictive gameplay!  And great multiplayer.  I have only one problem with the leftmost drum, I can’t manage to set a comfortable height, such that the hammer does not fall in and at the same time it is comfortable to play.  But perhaps this is just my subjective feature.  The rest of the game is just great!  I have tried almost every other popular rhythm game in VR, there are many good ones, but it is Ragnarock that I want to return to.  Many thanks to the developers for the game and for regular updates!  You are making a great product.  I hope you continue to support it for a long time.

I guess I’m not sure what I’m doing wrong, maybe it’s by traumatic brain injury, but I can’t hit notes consistently, at all.

I can play plenty of other rhythm games with zero issues, but this one seems to be coded differently, the beats don’t match up for me, even when I use the ‘show beat lines’ setting.

To make it worse, the ‘better’ songs in the game are locked to higher difficulties, making exploration of the soundtrack nearly impossible for me.

It’s frustrating, because I thought I just needed practice, and spent a few hours trying…but now I can’t get a refund, and I didn’t improve one bit from when I first got the game.

Not sure why there’s so many 5-star ratings, this doesn’t seem to be nearly as fun as beat saber or pistol whip, IMO, and isn’t nearly as accurate.
Discount: https://ocul.us/3GAUJcJ

reviews.review_title: Great game when the music lines up
reviews.review_description:
Awesome concept and great game. But so far I'd have to say, 50% of the tracks I've played don't seem to have a discernable connection to the patterns you hit on the drums. When they do the feeling is awesome and well worth it.

But yeah. Some of the "beat tracks" need a massive overhaul to make them actually line up with the songs.

After playing a lot more I am going to reaffirm that a lot of the tracks have beat targets that just are NOT in time to the song. Oh and for the love of Nordic Gods ... MAKE THE DRUMS LOUDER ! ... I can barely hear them over the music. As it's the main focus of the game seems odd they are so quiet compared to everything else.
For those of you who don’t think you’re into metal, I get it. It’s fun and ridiculous and a pure joy, just play it already.

It's an lot of fun and secretly exercises! 
Do yourself a favor and just buy the game. 
 It's worth the money

reviews.review_title: Stop thinking and just buy it!!!
reviews.review_description:
I honestly have not had this much fun playing a video game before!  Ragnarock and Half-life Alex made the purchase of the Oculus worth the price alone! Enough said.
    My only suggestion for Ragnarock devs would be to have a Demo so people can know how amazing this game is!

My husband bought his Q2 Headset first and he wanted to make sure I didn't get sick before he bought me one. So I played Ragnarok on his headset and OMG, I was so hooked and told him I needed my own Q2 headset so I could purchase the Game so we could drum together. Still not good at it, although I am getting better day by day. 

If you are like me and get motion sickness, it does get better. I concentrate more on hitting the discs once they land over the drum instead of the surroundings. But that is what helps me. If you know someone that has the Ragnarok Game, see if they'll let you play to see if it makes you sick or not.

Comparisons to beatsaber are useful but this is a different experience. Precision is heavily rewarded, and hitting your double speed boost is key to success. Sometimes the hit detection feels a little unintuitive though, and the fast drumming action may tire out your wrist. But the music is excellent
Super
What a stonker of a game!!! Have had so much fun going through the songs. Really satisfying rhythms and a nice level of challenge.
If you like drumming and air drumming along with music. While also liking rock music and harder. This is the game for you!

reviews.review_title: Not as great as the reviews say…
reviews.review_description: It’s kinda fun, but there’s no way it deserves better reviews than Beat Saber. The songs are not my cup of tea, they are kinda silly and not all that enthralling. The graphics and animation could be way better and I straight up wasn’t that impressed. Ima get the refund.

reviews.review_title: Must have for a metal FAN!!!!
reviews.review_description:
This game is AMAZING!!!

The feature to add custom music is AWESOME!!! 

5⭐️
Great music good gameplay and a great workout
For the price there are so many better games that do the same thing and it doesn’t feel as rhythmic as comparable games.
Eccellent game, if you like this kind of games you'll have log of fun

Remember when everyone and their grandmother were playing guitar hero and it was the coolest thing in the world? This feels just like that… music is so good, Vikings are awesome and I don’t hit any walls!
💯% worth it .
Haven't had such a blast since my first times on guitar hero 2.
Addictive! I really get into the game. Before i knew I was crouched beating the drums, swaying and feeling like the Viking leader of my ship. So glad i found console and game.
I first played on my son's Occulus.   I fell in love with it.  So much so, he bought me my own Occulus for Christmas.   :)  I can't recommend it enough.  Soo fun and always puts me in a good mood.

I played Beat Saber at a friend’s house about a year ago and ever since wanted my own Oculus. 

Saw Ragnarock and fell for it immediately! Mainly because that Thor movie is my fave and the cost was reasonable. Anyway, being a Band Hero/Rock Band lover, this game was very appealing! 

The very first song got me hooked and I’ve been playing the game for HOURS! Very addictive. Very sweaty! Still making my way through level 1 of each song because when I tried level 2 of the first song I failed miserably. 😬So far, this my favorite game! And 4 drums with 2 power up side cymbals keeps it simple for just about anyone. 

No motion sickness or headaches like I experienced with roller coaster and shooter-style games. Probably the fact that things are flying at you rather than you flying or moving forward. 

Anyway, I’m loving the game and hope they keep adding more songs to it! There’s a lot of room for growth for a game like this, so I hope the developers keep at it. I’d gladly pay for added content. Maybe quests or battles would be cool? Might as well add some historical facts/locations while they’re at it!
Extremely fun to play and headbang to

Use my referral link to get 25% off and I also receive $5.

Wanted guitar hero and bought rock band VR but then realized they don't sell the controllers anywhere near me and people wanted like 400$ for them. The solution was simple. Ragnarok. 
Great game, glad I didn't get rock band VR, wouldn't have found this gem.
